description: Monday.com is a work operating system that enables teams to plan, track, and collaborate on projects and workflows through customizable boards, automations, and integrations.
self_serve: Yes – free trial, self‑service sign‑up, and onboarding guides.
api_surface: GraphQL API with queries, mutations, and subscriptions; limited REST endpoints for specific use cases.
buildability: High – provides GraphQL client libraries, SDKs, and comprehensive documentation for rapid integration.
main_blocker: Rate limiting on the GraphQL API and lack of a fully featured REST API for some operations.
